name: connectMS
notes: Export ord2: read Server IP/Server Port from the registry (SOFTWARE\...\Matchmaker via ms_reg_open/select/read) or a default source; socket(AF_INET,SOCK_STREAM)+connect() into ms_socket; then send 'WAKEUP' (6B) and expect 'OK'. Codes: 1=OK, 0x3E8=socket() failed, 0x3E9=handshake rejected, 0x3EA=connect error, 0x3EB=proto.

name: initializeMS
notes: Export ord7: registration handshake — send record size (u32) + 'u' + player record, call ms_upload_init_arrays ('i'), then register the volume serial (GetVolumeInformation, '%d'-formatted); expect 'OK'. Creates the receive worker (ms_recv_thread, CREATE_SUSPENDED).

name: ms_upload_init_arrays
notes: Opcode 'i' (@0x1001D0FC): upload the init record as two groups of three u32 arrays, each u32-length-prefixed (ms_send_u32) and htonl-byteswapped. Part of the initializeMS handshake.

name: loginMShost
notes: Export ord9: opcode 'h' — login as game host; stores host cookie (ms_host_cookie) and ResumeThread on ms_recv_thread.

name: loginMSPlayer
notes: Export ord8: opcode 'p' — login as player; SuspendThread on ms_recv_thread and clear ms_host_cookie.

name: requestMSgame
notes: Export ord10: opcode 'r' — request game list; reads 'P'-prefixed records (ms_recv_u32 length, then payload) into the 0x24-byte linked-list nodes at ms_game_list_head (+0x10 len, +0x14 payload, +0x1C next, +0x20 head); returns 5-dword header + payload to caller.

name: selectMSgame
notes: Export ord12: opcode 's' — select game by id (rec+0x10, ms_send_u32); expect 'O'.

name: deselectMSgame
notes: Export ord3: opcode 'd' — deselect game by id (rec+0x10).

name: resetMSfilter
notes: Export ord11: opcode 't' — reset game-list filter/cursor; clears ms_game_count/ms_game_selected, sets ms_list_dirty.

name: updateMSgame
notes: Export ord14: opcode 'u' — upload/update the player-or-game record (ms_record_size bytes).

name: fetchMSgame
notes: Export ord4: opcode 'f' — fetch one game record by id; reads a 'P' payload of ms_record_size bytes.

name: sendMSresults
notes: Export ord13: opcode 'v' — send mission-results blob (ms_send_u32 length + data); expect 'O'.

name: getMSdatafilesize
notes: Export ord6: opcode 'z' — query server data-file size by name; reads a u32 size; 0xFFFFFFFF => not found (0x3F3); expect 'O'.

name: getMSdatafile
notes: Export ord5: opcode 'x' — download server data-file by name into a buffer; client acks 'O', expects 'K'.

name: closeMS
notes: Export ord1: opcode 'l' — quit/logout; closesocket(ms_socket); free the game list + DeleteCriticalSection; clear ms_running.

name: ms_recv_all
notes: recv() exactly N bytes in a loop ('Read Packet Error - Correcting...' on short read).

name: ms_send_all
notes: send() exactly N bytes in a loop ('Send Packet Error - Correcting...' on short write).

name: ms_recv_u32
notes: recv 4 bytes then ntohl -> host u32 (network-order length prefix).

name: ms_send_u32
notes: htonl then send 4 bytes (network-order length prefix).

name: ms_disconnect
notes: Receive-worker teardown: send 'l' quit opcode, closesocket, free game list + critical section.

name: ms_reg_open
notes: Registry-cache ctor: RegCreateKeyExA the HKLM SOFTWARE\... base keys (this+0x308/0x30C/0x310) for the Server IP/Port + data-file cache.

name: ms_reg_close
notes: Registry-cache dtor: RegFlushKey + RegCloseKey the open keys.

name: ms_reg_select_subkey
notes: Registry-cache: RegCreateKeyExA a named subkey (e.g. 'Matchmaker') into this+0x314.

name: ms_reg_read_value
notes: Registry-cache: RegQueryValueExA a named value into a buffer; if missing and a default is given, RegSetValueExA writes it (get-or-create). Used for 'Server IP'/'Server Port'.

name: ms_atoi
notes: Decimal-string-to-int (thin wrapper over FUN_10003430); parses the registry port string in connectMS.

name: ms_running
notes: Running flag: set in initializeMS, cleared by closeMS / ms_disconnect.

name: ms_conn_state
notes: Connection-state/idle flag toggled around operations; set when the link is torn down.

name: ms_list_dirty
notes: Game-list-dirty flag: resetMSfilter sets it; requestMSgame refetches when set and clears it when the list is exhausted.

name: ms_recv_thread
notes: MFC CWinThread* background receive pump (AfxBeginThread, CREATE_SUSPENDED); m_hThread at +0x28, Resume/Suspended by the login exports.

name: ms_game_list_tail
notes: Game-list append cursor (last node); advanced as 'P' records arrive.

name: ms_game_list_head
notes: Game-list head sentinel node (0x24 bytes; allocated in initializeMS).

name: ms_game_selected
notes: Current game-list selection/iteration node (walked by requestMSgame, reset by resetMSfilter).

name: ms_socket
notes: Connected TCP socket handle (AF_INET/SOCK_STREAM); first arg to every send/recv; 0 when not connected.

name: ms_host_cookie
notes: Host-mode cookie/handle set by loginMShost, cleared by loginMSPlayer.

name: ms_record_size
notes: Negotiated record size in bytes for game/player records (send/recv payload length).

name: ms_list_inited
notes: Game-list-initialised flag (set in initializeMS; guards teardown in closeMS).

name: ms_game_count
notes: Number of games accumulated in the list (incremented per 'P' record, reset by resetMSfilter).
